summary: New package initial release. No API design or tooling issues found. pnpm-lock conflict fixed twice by Copilot: first in commit 0ad95c1d (2026-04-22T02:42Z), then again in commit 8527a603 (2026-04-22T07:55Z) to fix missing @types/node@20.19.37 entry. All CI failures were due to broken lockfile.
